title: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
summary: As companies increasingly deploy LLMs to screen résumés and even conduct interviews , the finding that models can form biases from their hiring experience “is a really serious implication that they should grapple with,” says Wang.
caption: output/2026-07-20/ai-is-more-likely-than-humans-to-form-biases-when-hiring.txt
